_comment: Central cluster configuration — single source of truth for hosts/ports + the self-update source. Edit here, not in code. No secrets: self-update pulls from the PUBLIC GitHub repo's raw endpoint (update_repo/update_branch), which needs no token.
_discovery: controller_host may be an IP or "auto" (find the controller by UDP broadcast on discovery_port). A STATIC host that is unreachable at worker startup also falls back to discovery once — so a fresh clone runs with no edits. Broadcast does NOT cross subnets/VLANs/VPN: keep a static host for those. cluster_id "" = join whichever controller answers; set it on the controller AND its workers to pin a fleet when two controllers share a LAN.
